title: Let RP come back here
description: Make old versions compatible with 1.21.9 mcmeta.
body:
# Let RP come back here

When the RP author is only compatible with the new metadata format and the older version cannot read the RP, it will automatically interpolate the metadata to enable it to be loaded again.

**If the RP author clearly states that his RP no longer supports older versions, but you still load his RP through this mod and an error occurs, please do not report it to the RP author, as this will only cause them more trouble.**

## Example
![A 1.21.9 RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wNhvQa8X/images/81dddb05002445a55941563882951a619d716cc0.png)

Such RPs can be loaded in 1.21.9 (since `pack_format` is now optional), but if you need to load them in 1.21.8, you will need to manually modify the mcmeta file and add `pack_format` back in. This is obviously not practical if you have a lot of resource packs that need to be modified.

Once you have verified that these RPs can be used in older versions without too many errors (or no errors at all), you only need to manually add value for them. This mod does this for you automatically.

It will automatically generate the following fields according to the new mcmeta format of 1.21.9 when they are not detected:
- `pack_format`
- `supported_formats`

## For Modpack
If you comply with the license, you can use it freely for Modpack.

Modpacks that redistribute Minecraft game body (i.e. packages that package the entire Minecraft game including Mod files, Config, ShaderPacks, ResourcePacks, Library and launcher into a whole zip file) are not allowed to use this mod.

## License

This work has a restrictive license in addition to the original license to prevent some unexpected behavior,
see [404Setup Public License](https://github.com/404Setup/404Setup/blob/main/LICENSE.md)
